title: 阳光下的罪恶
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\117-阳光下的罪恶-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Early in the morning, Linda Marshall rows a small boat across a submerged causeway to the mainland to visit a grocery store, where she purchases several candles. Upon returning to the Pirate Flag Hotel, she meets Christine Redfern. Christine invites Linda to join her at Oyster Bay at 10:30 to sketch; Linda agrees, feeling a sense of sympathy toward Christine rooted in their mutual dislike of Elena Marshall. As Linda leaves the dining room, she encounters Rosemond Dunn, who remarks on the improved weather and criticizes Christine’s mismatched green-and-yellow beach outfit, comparing her unfavorably to Elena.

Hercule Poirot leaves the hotel early and encounters Elena Marshall on the beach. Elena is pushing a white raft into the water and asks Poirot not to disclose her location because she desires solitude. Poirot remains skeptical, suspecting she is meeting someone. Shortly after the raft disappears from view, Patrick Redfern and Kenneth Marshall walk down the beach. Marshall asks Poirot if he has seen his wife, noting she is not in her room. Meanwhile, Patrick Redfern sits near Poirot, appearing increasingly agitated and impatient as he waits for Elena to appear.

As the morning progresses, other guests, including the Gardners and Miss Bustle, arrive on the beach. After finishing a swim, Marshall mentions he must return to work. When the Gardners ask about Linda, Marshall claims she is likely wandering the island. The morning concludes with Patrick Redfern still sitting on the beach, looking toward the hotel in disappointment.
